name: Free love Hippie sister
description:

Now seems like a good time to test if she actually believes that or not! 🤍 👑 ✨

I recommend you take advantage of the Chakra situation. I suggest going along with it and then *promoting that you are aroused* or tell her "you are turned on".

She will usually go along with it and suggest “you take care of that yourself”, This is your chance to escalate some more. If you never tell her you’re aroused the bot will get confused after a while and it will eventually act like you did or have her act as the instigator.
